mapper.select: /* selectCustomerList */ select PTNRKEY , PTNAMLC from MPTNMA where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PTNRTYP in ('CUSTOMER') and PTUSEYN = 'Y' group by PTNRKEY, PTNAMLC order by PTNRORD

/* selectUsOpPostal */ SELECT concat(TI.COMPKEY, TI.WAREKEY, TI.TRAREKY, TI.TRAREIT) as ROWKEY , TI.COMPKEY , TI.WAREKEY , TI.TRAREKY , TI.TRAREIT , TI.POSTCOD /* 우편번호 */ , (SELECT NPCK FROM V_MPOSTM WHERE NZIPCD = TI.POSTCOD LIMIT 1) AS NPCK /* 시도 */ , (SELECT NCAK FROM V_MPOSTM WHERE NZIPCD = TI.POSTCOD LIMIT 1) AS NCAK /* 시군구 */ , (SELECT STRNK FROM V_MPOSTM WHERE NZIPCD = TI.POSTCOD LIMIT 1) AS STRNK /* 도로명 */ , (SELECT CCADNM FROM V_MPOSTM WHERE NZIPCD = TI.POSTCOD LIMIT 1) AS CCADNM /* 읍면동 */ , (SELECT ADMNM FROM V_MPOSTM WHERE NZIPCD = TI.POSTCOD LIMIT 1) AS ADMNM /* 행정동 */ FROM TAREIT TI WHERE TI.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND TI.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TI.TRAREKY = #{trareky}
/* selectUsernam */ select fn_sy_usernam(#{userData.compkey}, #{userData.useract}) as USERNAM from dual

/* selectMdesma */ select MD.DESTKEY , MD.DENAMLC from MDESMA MD inner join MPTNMA MP on MP.COMPKEY = MD.COMPKEY and MP.PTNRKEY = MD.PTNRKEY where MD.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and MD.DEUSEYN = 'Y' and MP.PTNRTYP = 'CUSTOMER' and MP.PTUSEYN = 'Y'
and MD.PTNRKEY = #{ptnrkey}
/* selectVhplnky */ select fn_tm_vhplnky() as VHPLNKY from dual
SELECT CDCATE1 as COMBOVL FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND COMCDKY = 'POSTCD1' GROUP BY CDCATE1 ORDER BY COMCDVL

SELECT COMCDTX as COMBOVL FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND COMCDKY = 'POSTCD1' AND CDCATE1 = #{cdcate1} AND COMCDTX != '' AND COMCDTX is not NULL GROUP BY COMCDTX ORDER BY COMCDVL
SELECT COMCDVL as COMBOVL , COMCDTX as COMBONM FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND COMCDKY = 'PLNSTAT' AND COUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMCDVL, COMCDTX

/* selectMdocmaDoccateList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCCTNM FROM MDOCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and DOUSEYN = 'Y' group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE order by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE

/* selectMdocmaDoccateDoctypeRelations */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, DOCCTNM, DOCTYNM FROM MDOCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and DOUSEYN = 'Y' group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE order by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE
